testsuite.name: Practice.AddtoCartTest

testcase.name: addToCart
testcase.system-out: The products has been added to cart successfully | Status: Pass

testsuite.system-out: --Executing Suite-- --Executing Test-- --Executing Class-- --Executing Method-- Login successful --Executing Method-- --Executing Method-- The products has been added to cart successfully | Status: Pass --Executing Method-- --Executing Class-- --Executing Test-- --Executing Suite--
